grader.method: Fresh blind top-to-bottom semantic review of the current 45-page reader dossiers, including mechanism recalculation, concept-first sequence checks, and all 132 exact objective records against the five-dimension coverage contract.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The course home begins with the visible text-to-prediction loop, expands it through five cumulative phases, distinguishes the shared spine from parallel advanced branches, and ends with a self-contained first action.
wholePageReview.feedback: The home accurately frames the full LLM stack without presenting the model as magic or overstating browser fixtures. Its concise pitch, phase arc, track outcomes, evidence boundary, duration, and start/continue action form a coherent promise that is borne out by the 44-lesson route.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Introduction moves from “A text prompt and the model's learned language patterns enter generation.” through “The model repeatedly predicts plausible next text from the prompt and the continuation so far.” to “The result is generated text whose claims still require evidence and external checking.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “Which task can an LLM complete from the supplied text alone with the clearest evidence boundary?”. Its prerequisite bridge, explicit limit, diagnostic retry, and three concrete objective records make the learning path cumulative, self-contained, and assessable without an external grader.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Tokenization moves from “Raw text enters a fixed tokenizer with a declared vocabulary and splitting rules.” through “The tokenizer divides the text into reusable pieces and replaces each piece with its stable identifier.” to “The result is an ordered token sequence that the model can process and later decode back to text.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “Why not give every possible word its own vocabulary entry?”. Its prerequisite bridge, explicit limit, diagnostic retry, and three concrete objective records make the learning path cumulative, self-contained, and assessable without an external grader.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The Embedding Layer moves from “An ordered token identifier enters a learned embedding table.” through “The table retrieves the adjustable feature vector stored for that token type.” to “The result is an initial token representation that later context-mixing layers can revise.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “When does the embedding for “bank” become different in river and finance sentences?”. Its prerequisite bridge, explicit limit, diagnostic retry, and three concrete objective records make the learning path cumulative, self-contained, and assessable without an external grader.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Positional Encoding moves from “Token representations and their positions in the sequence enter the position mechanism.” through “The mechanism adds or applies index and distance information while causal access rules restrict which positions can interact.” to “The result lets attention distinguish order and relative placement rather than seeing an unordered collection.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “What would unmasked, content-only self-attention lack without positional information?”. Its prerequisite bridge, explicit limit, diagnostic retry, and three concrete objective records make the learning path cumulative, self-contained, and assessable without an external grader.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Attention moves from “A token's current representation and the allowed earlier representations enter an attention head.” through “The head compares the query with candidate keys, normalizes their relevance, and combines the corresponding values.” to “The result is a context update containing information selected from allowed positions.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “Why are attention match scores scaled before they are compared?”. Its prerequisite bridge, explicit limit, diagnostic retry, and three concrete objective records make the learning path cumulative, self-contained, and assessable without an external grader.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Layers of Understanding moves from “All position representations enter one Transformer block.” through “Attention mixes information across allowed positions, the feed-forward path transforms each position, and residual paths preserve prior state.” to “Repeating blocks produces progressively revised representations for prediction.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “A pre-norm decoder block starts with x. wholePageReview.synopsis: Learning to Predict moves from “A tokenized sequence is split into each visible prefix and its actual next-token target.” through “The model predicts every allowed next token, compares predictions with targets, and sends the errors backward.” to “The result is a learning signal that changes parameters while respecting document and causal boundaries.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “What happens to cross-entropy loss when target-token probability rises?”. wholePageReview.synopsis: How Models Carry and Transform Representations moves from “A batch of token-position feature records enters a learned projection.” through “The same projection changes the feature description at every position while preserving batch and position identity.” to “The result is a new feature representation for each original prompt position.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “What stays the same when a learned projection transforms every text position?”. wholePageReview.synopsis: From Model Scores to Learning Feedback moves from “Raw vocabulary scores and the correct next-token target enter the feedback operation.” through “Softmax turns the scores into a probability distribution and cross-entropy reads the probability assigned to the target.” to “The result is a scalar loss whose size reflects the model's surprise at the correct token.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “If the model assigns more probability to the observed next token, what should happen to its training penalty?”. wholePageReview.synopsis: How Error Reaches Earlier Decisions moves from “A forward computation and its final loss enter backward credit assignment.” through “Backpropagation follows the recorded operations in reverse and combines each local change effect along every path.” to “The result is one gradient for every adjustable parameter showing how it influenced the loss.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “How does backpropagation assign responsibility to an earlier adjustable parameter?”. wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “What is the core efficiency idea of sparse MoE?”. Its prerequisite bridge, explicit limit, diagnostic retry, and three concrete objective records make the learning path cumulative, self-contained, and assessable without an external grader.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Multimodal Language Models moves from “Text and another modality enter modality-specific encoders and an alignment interface.” through “The system converts both into compatible representations and lets the language model attend to or predict across them.” to “The result is a multimodal response whose grounding depends on the encoder and alignment evidence.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.

Its prerequisite bridge, explicit limit, diagnostic retry, and three concrete objective records make the learning path cumulative, self-contained, and assessable without an external grader.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Interpretability and Model Editing moves from “A reproducible false claim, model activations, and a causal hypothesis enter investigation.” through “The learner intervenes on the suspected mechanism, checks changed behavior and collateral effects, and compares less invasive corrections.” to “The result is a bounded causal finding and the smallest correction supported by the evidence.” It then transfers that causal chain to a changed case before offering the exact authored objectives as optional post-mastery depth.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page keeps its mechanism technically consistent across the chapter narrative, operation trace, visual explanation, guided reveal, practice, and the changed-case check “Which result best supports a causal claim about an internal feature?”. Its prerequisite bridge, explicit limit, diagnostic retry, and three concrete objective records make the learning path cumulative, self-contained, and assessable without an external grader.
